title: Undead King returns linked Limited Summon when effect is negated

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, you may summon a creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon. Limited Summon(s) return to the cemetery if this card leaves the field, switches control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Undead King returns linked Limited Summon when effect is negated
plan.summary: Start with an Undead King-linked Limited Summon on the field, invalidate Undead King's effect, and verify the linked Limited Summon returns to the cemetery.

notes: Place Undead King on player_1 field as primary.
Start with an Undead creature Limited Summoned by and anchored to Undead King.
Resolve this as source/effect invalidation, matching cards such as Mind Sap that negate Undead King's creature effect.

steps: Invalidate Undead King's source-linked summon effect.
Return linked Limited Summon(s) to cemetery.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and cemetery.
manualVerification: Confirm the same cleanup is called when Undead King leaves the field or switches control.
riskNotes: This fixture validates source/effect invalidation cleanup. A Mind Sap-specific fixture should also confirm the negation card attaches and suppresses the source creature.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate linked Limited Summon cleanup when source effect is invalidated.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
